title: Add MC join flow observability metrics (task 11)
body:
## Summary
- 5 new metrics for MC join flow instrumentation (R-13)
- `mc_webtransport_connections_total`, `mc_jwt_validations_total`, `mc_session_joins_total`, `mc_session_join_duration_seconds`, `mc_session_join_failures_total`
- SLO-aligned histogram buckets [10ms-5s], bounded label cardinality
- 5 Grafana dashboard panels in mc-overview.json (Join Flow row)
- Metrics catalog updated with PromQL examples

## Review
- Security: CLEAR (no PII in labels, bounded cardinality)
- Test: CLEAR (unit tests for all recording functions)
- Observability: CLEAR (ADR-0011 compliant, correct recording sites)
- Code Quality: CLEAR (follows GC record_meeting_join pattern)
- DRY: CLEAR (no new duplication)
- Operations: CLEAR (Prometheus-scrapable, catalog complete)

## Test plan
- [x] 197 unit tests + 13 integration tests pass
- [x] cargo check/fmt/clippy clean
- [x] 14/14 guards pass (including validate-application-metrics, validate-histogram-buckets)
- [x] Semantic guard PASS
- [ ] MC join dashboard + alerts (task 13)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
